channel.title: Binod Jung Bogati
channel.description: A blog about Data Science and Machine Learning.

item.title: An Overview of Data Science
item.dc:creator: Binod Jung Bogati
item.description: This article is an overview of data science which explains its need/application, different job roles, and tips on how to pursue a career as a data scientist.

item.title: Create Distill Blog in R
item.dc:creator: Binod Jung Bogati
item.description: This is a tutorial on how you can create a Distill blog in R. Before the end of this article, you'll also learn to build and host your own website/blog using R.

item.title: Nepal Tourism Dashboard
item.dc:creator: Binod Jung Bogati
item.description: On Dec 14, our team DataSansar attended Solvathon 2019, a 2 days hackathon for solving problems with data-driven solutions.

item.title: Organized Tidyweek Data Analysis Bootcamp
item.dc:creator: Binod Jung Bogati
item.description: R Nepal organized Tidyweek – Data Analysis with R Bootcamp between Sep 20th-23rd, 2019.

item.title: Story Behind Hacktoberst Kathmandu 2019
item.dc:creator: Binod Jung Bogati
item.description: In 2018, I had participated in Hacktoberfest. The learning I got from participation helped me explore more about open-source culture.

item.title: My Experience attending useR! 2019
item.dc:creator: Binod Jung Bogati
item.description: Here, I'm going to tell experience attending useR 2019 who is an undergrad student and travelled all the way from Nepal.

item.title: That Day at GitHub Satellite 2019
item.dc:creator: Binod Jung Bogati
item.description: I attended GitHub Satellite 2019 conference held at Kraftwerk, Berlin on May 23. The conference brings together the developers, maintainers, and team leaders who are changing the world through software.

item.title: Brief about R programming
item.dc:creator: Binod Jung Bogati
item.description: This article is about R programming, it's importance, who uses it and why it's popular among statisticians.

item.title: Objects in R
item.dc:creator: Binod Jung Bogati
item.description: In this article, you'll learn about the R Object, its type and attributes.

item.title: Write your first R code
item.dc:creator: Binod Jung Bogati
item.description: A short tutorial to write your first R code

item.title: Install R and RStudio
item.dc:creator: Binod Jung Bogati
item.description: A guide on how to install R and RStudio application on Windows, Linux.

item.title: A Step Towards Data Science
item.dc:creator: Binod Jung Bogati
item.description: I'm quite excited to share this news, that I've successfully completed #100DaysOfCode Challenge. Well, I spent 100 days devoting myself to learn Data Science and Machine Learning (with R).

item.title: Starting with #100DaysOfCode
item.dc:creator: Binod Jung Bogati
item.description: Here's the story of my coding journey that I stepped in and how I allowed myself to make coding as a habit.

item.title: How to Register free (.com.np) Nepali Domain
item.dc:creator: Binod Jung Bogati
item.description: Now you can register to get free Nepali domain .com.np (ccTLDs). The domain validates for lifetime so you don’t have to pay for renewal fees.

item.title: How to Upload Your Project to GitHub
item.dc:creator: Binod Jung Bogati
item.description: This tutorial is basically aimed for the users who are learning about uploading their first project (repository) in GitHub via version control tool called Git. It’s obvious that confusion hovers around you when you’re just getting started with Git.

item.title: MSP 2017 Springboard : A Step towards Success
item.dc:creator: Binod Jung Bogati
item.description: MSP 2017 Springboard was two days (12-13th Aug) event organized by Microsoft Innovation Center Nepal. The event was the full package of 132 MSPs from different colleges in the New Hall at 4th Floor of MICNepal.

item.title: GitHub Student Developer Pack : Free For Students
item.dc:creator: Binod Jung Bogati
item.description: GitHub is now offering its Developer pack free for the students who are intending to learn, share and host their codes online safely.

item.title: MSP Orientation 2017 : A Great Experience with MICNepal
item.dc:creator: Binod Jung Bogati
item.description: The event starts from morning (29 May 2016), when I went for Microsoft Student Partners (MSP) orientation program.
